answer.text: Buying individual stocks based on analyst recommendations
Following an indexing strategy by buying all securities that are part of an index
Investing in real estate and gold exclusively

explanation.text: **The Logic:** Passive investing follows an indexing strategy where an investor buys all securities in an index to earn the asset class return. **The Trap:** No stock selection, short selling, or alternative investments. Simply replicate the index. **Cross-Exam Context:** Index funds and ETFs implement passive investing, covered in NISM V-A and XV. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** Passive investing has grown due to lower costs and difficulty of consistently beating indices.
